title: Senior Priority Scheme (SPS) (near existing home)
text:
Senior Priority Scheme (SPS) (near existing home) - SupportGoWhere
Senior Priority Scheme (SPS) (near existing home)
Share link
Supports seniors in buying a 2-room Flexi flat to live near their existing home.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Seniors receive priority when they apply for a 2-room Flexi flat to age-in-place near their existing home.
Collapse all sections
About this support

Seniors who wish to age-in-place near their existing home can enjoy priority access when they apply for a 2-room Flexi flat under the Senior Priority Scheme (near existing home).

Who is this for?

Seniors who wish to buy a 2-room Flexi flat that is within 4km of their owner-occupied property (either HDB flat or private residential property).

How to apply?

Obtain a HDB Flat Eligibility (HFE) letter through the HDB Flat Portal

If you meet the eligibility criteria during your flat application, you may apply for this scheme in your flat application

Where can I find help?

View more details

HDB Hotline: 6866-3066

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 22 May 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
